div.p: S: |md S (symbol_address) Target symbol's virtual address Type: uint64_t | { style.fill: "#BBDEFB" }
A: |md A (addend) Signed adjustment value Type: int64_t | { style.fill: "#BBDEFB" }
check: |md Range Validation Verify if computed fits in int32_t: if (computed < -2147483648 || computed > 2147483647)

ul.li: S: Symbol (Where we want to go)
P: Place (Where the patch is written)
